# Melodino

> A free, open-source, gamified piano learning app for children aged 3-12.

## What

Single HTML file piano learning application with:
- ROLI LUMI keyboard integration (USB-C, LED control via SysEx)
- Falling notes "Guitar Hero" style gameplay
- 23 songs across 4 worlds (French nursery rhymes + classical)
- Age-adaptive difficulty (3-5, 6-8, 9-12 years)
- Multi-child profiles with separate progression
- Stars, worlds, streaks gamification
- Works with any USB MIDI keyboard or computer keyboard
- 100% offline after first load (PWA)
- Zero data collection (COPPA/GDPR-K compliant)

## Tech Stack

- Vanilla JavaScript (no framework, no build step)
- Web Audio API (SoundFont + triangle wave fallback)
- Web MIDI API (input + SysEx output for LUMI LEDs)
- Canvas 2D (falling notes animation at 60fps)
- IndexedDB (async storage for profiles/progress/errors)
- Service Worker (cache-first, fallback CDN for soundfont)
- GitHub Pages (free HTTPS hosting)

## How to Use

1. Open index.html in Chrome/Edge on a computer
2. Optionally connect a ROLI LUMI or any USB MIDI keyboard
3. Pick a profile, choose a song, and start playing

## Key Files

- index.html — Complete application (single file, ~80KB)
- sw.js — Service Worker with fallback CDN resilience
- _assets/manifest.json — PWA manifest with shortcuts
- package.json — Dev dependencies (tests only)
- tests/e2e/ — Playwright E2E tests (6 spec files)
- tests/unit/ — Vitest unit tests (songs, scoring, input)

## Architecture

The app is organized in numbered PART sections within index.html:
- PART 0: i18n + Solfege
- PART 1: LUMI SysEx (LED control library)
- PART 2: Audio (soundfont-player + fallback)
- PART 3: MIDI (Web MIDI input/output)
- PART 4: Songs (23 songs, 4 worlds, durations)
- PART 5: Storage (IndexedDB profiles/progress/settings)
- PART 6: Game Engine (falling notes, scoring, HUD)
- PART 7: Piano Builder (DOM keyboard + key events)
- PART 8: Profiles + Progression + UI screens

## Error Logging

Local-only error logger (COPPA-safe):
- IndexedDB `melodino-errors` database
- Categories: audio, midi, storage, network, ui
- Zero PII, auto-purge after 7 days
- Exportable from Parent Dashboard

## Testing

- `npm run test:unit` — Vitest (songs, scoring, input mapping)
- `npm run test:e2e` — Playwright (full app flows)
- CI: GitHub Actions (validate + lighthouse + e2e + security)

## Contributing

Add songs in JSON format, add translations, or improve accessibility.
See CONTRIBUTING.md for details.
